brujah.label: Brujah
brujah.description: Revolution in their veins and a grudge for anyone talking down to them.

gangrel.label: Gangrel
gangrel.description: More comfortable on the road than in a salon.

malkavian.label: Malkavian
malkavian.description: Sees the crack in everything. Can't always explain it.

nosferatu.label: Nosferatu
nosferatu.description: Ugly, unseen, and usually first to know.

toreador.label: Toreador
toreador.description: Beauty is leverage. They never forget to spend it.

tremere.label: Tremere
tremere.description: Rank, ritual, and blood magic behind locked doors.

ventrue.label: Ventrue
ventrue.description: Breeding, boardrooms, and the assumption you'll obey.

lasombra.label: Lasombra
lasombra.description: Faith, shadow, and a smile that never reaches the eyes.

ministry.label: Ministry
ministry.description: Vice sold as salvation. Serpents in good linen.

hecata.label: Hecata
hecata.description: Death is family business. They collect on both sides.

ravnos.label: Ravnos
ravnos.description: A good story beats the truth. They travel light.

tzimisce.label: Tzimisce
tzimisce.description: Landlords of nightmare. They remember every trespass.

salubri.label: Salubri
salubri.description: Healers with a price on their heads.

caitiff.label: Caitiff
caitiff.description: No clan. Pick three Disciplines and make your own luck.
caitiff.discipline_note: Choose any three disciplines at creation

thin_blood.label: Thin-Blood
thin_blood.description: Half in the mortal world. Alchemy where pedigree fails.
